headline: 今日AI速览：学术研究最活跃
narrative:
今日共收录242篇AI新闻，分类分布：学术研究159篇, 开源项目46篇, 模型发布30篇, 产品/API7篇。热门标签：Agent（56篇）。其中16%的文章有多来源交叉验证。

▸ Dicklesworthstone /destructive_command_guard：The Destructive Command Guard (dcg) is for blocking dangerous git and shell commands from being exec

▸ HKUDS /Vibe-Trading："Vibe-Trading: Your Personal Trading Agent"

▸ Shubhamsaboo /awesome-llm-apps：100+ AI Agent & RAG apps you can actually run — clone, customize, ship.

▸ Crosstalk-Solutions /project-nomad：Project N.O.M.A.D, is a self-contained, offline survival computer packed with critical tools, knowle

▸ ColeMurray /background-agents：An open-source background agents coding system
text: 今日共收录242篇AI新闻，分类分布：学术研究159篇, 开源项目46篇, 模型发布30篇, 产品/API7篇。热门标签：Agent（56篇）。其中16%的文章有多来源交叉验证。
